original: Paulette
\n\nShe is no longer tripped!
Some of her glowing bullets manage to connect with "+e.getCombatName()+".
Thanks to "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" quick thinking, her salvo only managed to displace some dust.
(Miss)
Her claws connect with "+e.getCombatName()+"!
Thanks to "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" superior reflexes, her claws leave "+e.getCombatName()+" unmolested.
\n\n"+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" evade"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" her tail’s powerful hit.
\n\nDespite "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" best efforts, the strong tail hits "+e.getCombatName()+" right on the head.
Fortunately, "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" sealed armor prevents the arousing pheromones from reaching "+e.getCombatName()
but the force of the impact knocks "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to the ground regardless. "+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"are":"is")+" tripped!
The powerful strike
almost knocks "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+"down whilst
sends "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" to the ground whilst
potent pheromones drown "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" nostrils with sultry aromas.
"+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?"are":"is")+" tripped!

Her whip connects with "+e.getCombatName()+", constricting "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" body in a draining embrace. “Resistance is futile, [pc.name]”\n\n"+H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+(e.isPlural||e.isPlayer()?" are ":" is ")+"grappled!
H.m.capitalize(e.getCombatName(),!1)+" manage"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" to dodge her draining whip.
continues to leech "+H.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" shield’s energy away.
, unable to find any more energy to leech from "+H.m.possessive(e.getCombatName())+" shield, drains "+e.getCombatPronoun("hisher")+" lifeforce instead.

Taking hold of "+e.getCombatName()+", the flying amazon roughly drags "+e.getCombatPronoun("himher")+" across and over the ragged granite wall. After a dozen painful seconds, she sends "+e.getCombatName()+" flying at a stray armor plate.
The powerful impact against the geddanium hunk leaves "+e.getCombatName()+" staggered.
“Fall to your death! Worthless insect!”
At the last moment, "+e.getCombatName()+" jump"+(e.isPlayer()||e.isPlural?"":"s")+" out of her reach. Her claws close firmly over unlucky molecules of oxygen and nitrogen.
\n\n"+textify(s||(s=(0,T.Z)(["The former XO hits Strict-9 square in the chest. The sheer force of the blow knocks her back, releasing you from her crushing grasp!"])))
\n\n"+textify(r||(r=(0,T.Z)(["Strict-9 tightens her grip on you. She nimbly dodges Paulette’s attack, crushing you with her powerful thighs as she leaps out of reach!"])))
\n"+textify(l||(l=(0,T.Z)(["The "," hits her square in the chest!"])),t[o][1])
\n\n"+textify(h||(h=(0,T.Z)(["Strict-9 evades the energy blast!"])))
\n"+textify(d||(d=(0,T.Z)(["Her charged hit squeezes a pained groan out of ","!"])),e.getCombatName())
\n\n"+textify(g||(g=(0,T.Z)(["Her daring strike goes wide!"])))
\n\n"+textify(y||(y=(0,T.Z)(["Paulette’s sharp, glowing tail-cap hits Strict-9 square in the chest!"])))
The powerful lunge staggers Strict-9!
\n\n"+textify(m||(m=(0,T.Z)(["Strict-9 effortlessly deflects the attack with her own tail!"])))

"+textify(w||(w=(0,T.Z)(["The former XO strikes Strict-9’s belly with earth-rending force! The zaika mercenary screams in pain as Paulette lifts her off the ground and throws her across the room! Strict-9 slowly stands back up, holding her fuming middle with a hand. “You dirty tailsucker! I’ll make you pay for this!”"],["The former XO strikes Strict-9’s belly with earth-rending force! The zaika mercenary screams in pain as Paulette lifts her off the ground and throws her across the room!\n\nStrict-9 slowly stands back up, holding her fuming middle with a hand. “You dirty tailsucker! I’ll make you pay for this!”"])))
\n\n"+textify(k||(k=(0,T.Z)(["“You’re too slow!” Strict-9 barks, swirling out of reach!"])))
